verses.2: From the end of the earth, I will call to you when my heart is overwhelmed.
verses.3: For you have been a refuge for me,
verses.4: I will dwell in your tent forever.
verses.5: For you, God, have heard my vows.
verses.6: You will prolong the king’s life.
verses.7: He shall be enthroned in God’s presence forever.
verses.8: So I will sing praise to your name forever,
